simulation_notes: No app/apps/src/pages service directories were detected in this codebase (it is a Claude Code plugin, not an application). The doc-update workflow was simulated by performing the detection logic manually: scanning for service roots, identifying project structure, and generating CODEMAPS-style documentation. The Node scripts (detect_changes.mjs, extract_structure.mjs) were not executed because there are no service code directories to scan. Documentation was generated covering all project components: agents, skills, references, scripts, and runtime architecture.
